none: New Elmira urban renewal project : environmental impact statement.

This document concerns the New Elmira Urban Renewal Project, a proposed development in Elmira, Chemung County, New York. It’s an environmental impact statement (EIS) for a 100-year urban renewal project, aiming to revitalize the area. The project involves the construction of new power lines and transmission rights-of-ways, potentially impacting the Chemung River and flood protection structures. The Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) and the Office of the Chief of Engineers (OCHE) are involved, with the goal of minimizing environmental disruption through careful planning and mitigation measures. The document emphasizes compliance with NEPA and the National Historic Preservation Act, requiring detailed assessment of potential impacts on historical and cultural resources.
